summary: Frontend-only Playwright verification of the new FX + animated-number features in TipCalc Pro on the Expo web preview (375x667). All review_request items pass functionally: animated number transitions show distinct intermediate frames (~80ms/200ms/350ms) before settling at the target value within ~450ms for bill change, tip-chip change, and people-stepper change; FX live conversion via open.er-api.com returns real rates (USD->TRY=46.1261, EUR->TRY=53.2353); display-mode picker shows title 'Show Results In', base-mode picker shows 'Bill Currency'; hero swaps to ₺ with '≈ $118.00 USD' sub-line; switching base to EUR flips bill prefix to € and refetches the rate; when display==base both fx-status and base sub-lines disappear (counts=0) and only one symbol is shown; reset clears bill+tip+people but keeps the currency (EUR retained after reset); custom + 25% chips still function; save-to-history and EUR base-currency preference both persisted across a full reload. The fxStatus 'Loading rate…' transient was not captured because rates were already in the in-memory cache on subsequent picks (expected and acceptable per the request). No red screens or runtime errors. Two pre-existing React Native deprecation warnings observed in the console (shadow* style props, props.pointerEvents). Iteration_1 'Save button hidden under sticky RESET footer' remains and was worked around with scroll.

ui_bugs.issue: Still overlapped by sticky RESET footer at 375x667 — required a programmatic scroll-to-bottom before clicking. Increase ScrollView contentContainerStyle paddingBottom further or render Save above the footer.

issues: When EUR is selected as base, the bill prefix '€' is centered next to the input without a trailing space — visually fine but worth confirming on RTL/wider symbols.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Reference: /app/frontend/app/index.tsx (styles.resultsCard uses shadowColor/shadowOffset/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius)
Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Reference: /app/frontend/app/index.tsx line ~568 (`pointerEvents="none"` on the toast View)

action_items: Migrate styles.resultsCard from shadow* props to RN >=0.76 `boxShadow` style (or wrap behind Platform.select to preserve native iOS shadows).
Move `pointerEvents="none"` from prop to `style={{ pointerEvents: 'none' }}` on the save-toast View in index.tsx.
(Carry-over from iteration_1) Lift the Save-to-History button above the sticky RESET footer, or increase ScrollView paddingBottom so it isn't obscured at 375x667.
Optional: surface fxStatus 'Loading rate…' for at least one frame even when the cache is warm (e.g., always set 'loading' before reading the cache) to make the transient observable in QA.
critical_code_review_comments: useAnimatedNumber correctly cancels its previous RAF on retarget and starts from current `value`, producing the smooth intermediate frames we observed.
fx.ts in-memory cache (1h TTL) is fine for a client demo but is lost on reload — acceptable per the review note that display currency may reset to base after reload.
Modal mode switch (`pickerMode = 'base' | 'display'`) cleanly reuses the same modal; titles map correctly to 'Bill Currency' / 'Show Results In'.
isConverting gating (currency.code !== displayCurrency.code) reliably hides fx-status, total-per-person-base, tip-per-person-base, and footer sub-lines — verified count=0 when EUR=EUR.
handleSave persists `calc.totalBill` / `calc.totalPerPerson` (BASE, pre-FX) plus `currency.code` — matches the requirement that history stores base amounts.
seed_data_creation: One history entry created via Save-to-History during the test run (EUR base). Not cleared — main agent can ignore or wipe via the existing history clear-all UI.
context_for_next_testing_agent: TestIDs verified: bill-amount-input, tip-chip-{10,15,18,20,25}, tip-chip-custom, custom-tip-input, people-increment/decrement/count, round-up-switch, results-card, display-currency-button, currency-picker-button, currency-picker-modal, currency-search-input, currency-row-{CODE}, currency-modal-close, fx-status, total-per-person, total-per-person-base, tip-per-person, tip-per-person-base, total-tip, total-bill, save-button, reset-button, save-toast, history-button. Animation duration ~450ms easeOutCubic; sampling at 80/200/350ms reliably catches intermediate frames. open.er-api.com responded successfully for USD and EUR bases during the run.
